raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winsch uſtaifija ſew ar-
san Pilsfahus/ un Deewß
ve tam Anis un Wehrichus
â Pulkâ/ jo Deewß dewe tam
hti lectu Mantu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas pats Iſkijus aiſtat-
to augſchaju UhdensStrautu
ona/ un waddija to us letju
tt Wakkrapnſſi us Dahwi-
Pilsfahru/ jo Iſkijum laime-
s wiſs winna Darbß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kad tee Babelês Leeli-
gi/ kaß pee winna fuhtiti
pe/ pehz to Brihnuna-Sih-
nahze waizahrt/ kaß tai Sem-
bija notiktuſi/ tad atſtahje
eivs winnu ta/ ka wiſch to
rdinaja/ ka ſinnans taptu/
winnu Sirði buhtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kaß wehl no Iſkijus Lee-
in atteek/ un winna Schehla-
a/ rangi/ tas irr rakſtihts
ch ta Praweeta Eſaijus A-
za Dehla Parahdiſchanas/ un
ch to Juha un Israëta Keh-
tu Grahmatas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Iſkijus aiſmigge ar
veem Tehweem/ un tee aprak-
to augſtaka Rappu Weeta to
hwida Behrnu/ ir wiſs Juh-
un Jeruſalemes Eedsſhwotaji
ahdija tam Gohdu/ kad tas
a nomirris/ un winna Dehls
anaffius tappe par Kehniunu
na Weetâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nahl atkah eekſch ſawas Walſtibagß/ un ap-
stiprina to Pilsfahru Jeruſalemi: 14. No-
pohſta to pirmaju Elkadeewibu: 15. Mirſt/
un winna Dehls Among tohp par Kehniunu
pehz winna: 20. Kas no ſaweem Kalpeem
nokauts tohp: 24.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Anaffius bija diwipa-
desints Gaddug wezz/
kad tas par Kehniunu
tappe/ un waldtja peezdertmits
un peežus Gaddug Jeruſalemê.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un darrija/kaß tam KUN-
GAM ne patikke/ pehz to Pa-
gazu Negantibahm/ ko tas
KUNGSS to Israëta Behrnu
Preeſcha bij iſdsinnis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas uſtaifija atkah tohs
Augſtumus/ ko winna Tehws
Iſkijus bij nolauiſjs/ un wiſch
uſtaifija Baalim Altarus/ un
darrija Elka Meschus/ un pa-
kanntjahs preeſch wiſſu Debbes
Spehku/ un kalpoja teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſsch darrija arridsan
Altarus ta KUNGA Namina/
no ka tas KUNGSS bij fazztijß:
Jeruſalemê buhs mans Wahrdß un
muſchigt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir wiſſam Debbes Speh-
kam darrija wiſsch Altarus ab-
bejòs KUNGA Pagalmòß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſsch liſſe arridsan
fawus Dehluß zaur Ugguni eet
Innoma Dehla Eeleija/ un ſib-
leja un eezeenija Putnu-Breh-
fchann/ un buhra/ un peeturreja
Sihlneekuß un Sihnes-Zeenita-
jus/ wiſsch darrija kohti dauds/
kaß tam KUNGAM ne patikke/
winnu apkaitinadains.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
